rationale: Build on the current best soft quant-aware projection ramp by fixing its endgame mismatch instead of exploring another broad quantizer variant. In the current script, if the final training step lands on a quant-aware interval, the late soft roundtrip runs but the intended exact pre-save roundtrip is skipped; the best run log shows this happened at step 899. This change always applies the exact final roundtrip once quant-aware mode has been used, so the serialized model and final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact evaluation are aligned even when the last training step already took a soft snap. The hot loop and artifact format stay unchanged, and the script stays lean.
title: Always-Exact Final Quant-Aware Snap
